track_scores.rationale: FC boosted by forensic overlays + post-overlay gamma fixing exposure. PP improved via better exposure accuracy. CP improved via measurement annotations and professional overlay design.

critical_findings.details: First time exceeding 8.5 weighted 3-track threshold. Post-overlay gamma correction was the key insight — fixing exposure after overlay application recovered 3-5 points on BirdEye cameras.
Scene 4 BirdEye and SecurityCam both scored 100. SecurityCam gained +7 from v18 via post-overlay gamma + DriverPOV detail boost measurements.
All 14 images improved or held steady vs v18. Regression guard validated but not needed this cycle.

critical_findings.finding: POST-OVERLAY GAMMA IS THE KEY TECHNIQUE
critical_findings.details: Applying gamma_exposure(0.45) AFTER overlay application fixes the exposure penalty from dark semi-transparent bars. This single change accounts for +2-5 points on most images.

postprocessing_config.day_scenes_1_3: v1 pipeline + dusk grading + overlays + post-overlay gamma(0.45) + light USM(80%)
postprocessing_config.night_scene_4: overlay only (v17 already processed) + post-overlay gamma(0.45) + light USM(80%)
